import * as React from "react"; import warning from "tiny-warning"; import { routerContext } from "./routerContext.js"; function useRouter(opts) { const value = React.useContext(routerContext); warning( !((opts?.warn ?? true) && !value), "useRouter must be used inside a <RouterProvider> component!" ); return value; } export { useRouter }; //# sourceMappingURL=useRouter.js.map
